title: Contribute to workplace health and safety processes
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Contribute to workplace health and safety processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan to work safely

pcs.text: Plan work according to relevant legislation, standards, codes of practice and safe work procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan work according to relevant legislation, standards, codes of practice and safe work procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan work according to relevant legislation, standards, codes of practice and safe work procedures.

pcs.text: Identify hazards as part of preparation for work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards as part of preparation for work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards as part of preparation for work.

pcs.text: Control risks associated with hazards prior to starting work, including using personal protective clothing and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Control risks associated with hazards prior to starting work, including using personal protective clothing and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Control risks associated with hazards prior to starting work, including using personal protective clothing and equipment.

pcs.text: Report inadequacies in control measures according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report inadequacies in control measures according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report inadequacies in control measures according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report incidents and injuries according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report incidents and injuries according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report incidents and injuries according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan to work safely

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Support members of the work group to accurately record incidents and complete associated workplace documentation according to workplace procedures.
